hyperedges.label: ADR chain: CUA pivot → PM model → SuperDoc fork → docx converter
Data-driven ribbon pipeline: data → renderer → dispatcher
RL instrumentation triad: logger + verifier + MCP server
SuperDoc rejected: AGPL + Vue renderer + deprecated Step access
Phase 2 strangler-fig slice sequence (character → paragraph/lists → styles → clipboard → find-replace → insert → file-io)
